---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a CLI, workflow, or retrieval improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the command, output, config, or workflow change you want.

## Why This Belongs In video-cli

Explain why this should be part of the core tool instead of a one-off script.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Clear user-facing command or workflow
- [ ] Expected output shape is described
- [ ] Docs and tests impact is identified
